questions.q: What is the main goal of the National Education Policy 2020?
opts: To prepare students for the 21st century

questions.q: What is the role of the National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT)?
What is the name of the textbook of mathematics for Grade 8 (Part 1)?
opts: National Council of Educational Research and Training

questions.q: What is the main focus of the textbook Ganita Prakash?
opts: To make learning fun and engaging
To focus on advanced mathematical concepts
To prepare students for competitive exams

questions.q: What is the significance of mathematics in school education?
opts: It helps develop basic arithmetic skills
It contributes to the development of capacities to make informed choices and decisions
It is only useful for science and social science
It is not essential for overall school education

questions.q: What is the role of mathematics at the Middle Stage?
opts: To prepare students for secondary stage
To develop artistic and creative skills

questions.q: What is the main challenge of learning mathematics at the Middle Stage?
opts: It is too close to the experience and environment of a learner
It requires a balance between intuition and rigour
It is not challenging at all

questions.q: What is the main goal of the Chapter 1: A Square and A Cube?
opts: To introduce special types of numbers
To reveal the story of numbers

questions.q: What is the significance of the Chapter 2: Power Play?
opts: It discusses short and logical ways of expressing very large numbers
It reveals the story of numbers

questions.q: What is the main focus of the Chapter 3: A Story of Numbers?
opts: To reveal how the idea of number and number representation evolved over time

questions.q: What is the significance of the Chapter 4: Quadrilaterals?
opts: It discusses interesting types of four-sided figures and problems based on them
It reveals the story of numbers

questions.q: What is the main goal of the Chapter 5: Number Play?
opts: To show different properties of numbers
To reveal the story of numbers

questions.q: What is the role of school libraries in the development of this textbook?
opts: To provide resources for students to explore

questions.q: What is the significance of the National Curriculum Framework for School Education (NCF-SE) 2023?
opts: It aims to equip students with skills needed to grow
It focuses on advanced mathematical concepts
It prepares students for competitive exams
